summary: Home restructured as mode-aware control center with seller/affiliate KPI layouts, inline AI recommendation and alert cards, mock-data/service layer per branch-runtime-strategy.

interfaceChanges.description: Mode-aware seller/affiliate control-center layout via getHomeDashboard service
web/src/lib/services/home.ts routes UI-only mock vs real API aggregation
Home alert banner cards replace standalone /alerts tab context
Inline AI recommendation card embedded on Home for both modes

mappings.criterion: Seller Home dark theme + AI recommendation without scrolling
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_home_control_center.test.tsx::renders dark theme with AI recommendation in above-the-fold section

mappings.criterion: Affiliate Home light theme + commission opportunity card
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_home_control_center.test.tsx::renders light theme with commission opportunity recommendation card

mappings.criterion: Alerts appear as cards on Home
UI-only renders mock data without API calls
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_home_control_center.test.tsx::loads dashboard via service without calling shops API

recommendations: Manually verify seller above-fold layout on a 667px viewport with NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1.
